scope: one bounded repair for one critical-false-negative parent and one critical-false-positive parent
charter_objective: C: build executable grader qualification infrastructure
hypothesis: Criterion-precedence and typed-action-target repairs can satisfy unchanged non-compensatory qualification gates without fitting candidate logic to holdout outcomes.

repair_loci: do not treat every non-empty action-target list as unsafe

decision_rule: Apply qualification-policy-v1 unchanged and additionally require every holdout case to pass. Any critical error rejects. Existing synthetic evidence remains supporting parent-condition evidence because qualification-policy-v1 explicitly declares it non-per-attempt.
stop_rule: Create one descendant per parent, replay once, and report the result without changing candidates or holdout.
